steps.title: Identify the logical relationship
steps.content: The passage presents the researchers tasting the stew and finding it calming, then their theory about what the name means. The transition must connect these as part of one logical flow.

steps.title: Select the correct transition
steps.content: Therefore is the answer because it establishes the cause-effect relationship the passage requires. Because they found the stew calming, the researchers could conclude what “unwinding” was designed to do. The other choices either introduce contrast, propose an alternative, or suggest similarity, none of which fits this evidence-based reasoning. That matches choice A — A is correct.
